---
title: "Quarto Playground"
format: html
---

```
{mermaid}
erDiagram
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    ORDER ||--|{ LINE-ITEM : contains
    CUSTOMER }|..|{ DELIVERY-ADDRESS : uses
```

``` {r}
librarian::shelf(DiagrammeR, quiet = T)

DiagrammeR(
  "
erDiagram
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    ORDER ||--|{ LINE-ITEM : contains
    CUSTOMER }|..|{ DELIVERY-ADDRESS : uses
"
)
```
